reason: A template for the saved-text file name is a functional addition to TextDropService, not a redesign. The UI diff only adds a label, a text box and a token hint to the existing System section of the settings window, reusing the established field layout and styles, and passes the config value through at the existing text-drop call site. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and the overall settings layout are untouched. The rest of the diff is AppConfig, TextDropService (BuildName/slug) and tests. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
